qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of project storage required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: A minimum of 41 TB of project storage is required for a RAC application.

qa_pairs.question: Which General Purpose clusters does the minimum project storage requirement apply to for RAC applications?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum project storage requirement applies to Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, and Narval General Purpose clusters.

qa_pairs.question: How is the minimum project storage calculated if I need resources across multiple General Purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum of 41 TB for project storage is the sum of all project storage needed across all General Purpose clusters, not an amount required for each cluster individually.

qa_pairs.question: Does the minimum project storage limit apply to the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the minimum project storage amount does not apply to the Trillium cluster; any amount of project storage needed on Trillium must be requested through the RAC.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of nearline storage required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: A minimum of 101 TB of nearline storage is required for a RAC application.

qa_pairs.question: Which General Purpose clusters does the minimum nearline storage requirement apply to for RAC applications?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum nearline storage requirement applies to Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, and Narval General Purpose clusters.

qa_pairs.question: How is the minimum nearline storage calculated if I need resources across multiple General Purpose clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum of 101 TB for nearline storage is the sum of all nearline storage needed across all General Purpose clusters, not an amount required for each cluster individually.

qa_pairs.question: Does the minimum nearline storage limit apply to the HPSS cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the minimum nearline storage amount does not apply to the HPSS cluster; any amount of nearline storage needed on HPSS must be requested through the RAC.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of dCache storage that must be requested for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: Any amount of dCache storage must be requested, as the minimum is 0 TB.

qa_pairs.question: If I need both project and nearline storage for my project, do both requests have to meet their individual minimums to be eligible for RAC?
qa_pairs.answer: No, if you need both project and nearline storage, you can request both resources as long as one of the requests is equal to or greater than the minimum specified. In that case, the online form must include both project and nearline storage resources needed.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Compute Cloud VCPU (VCPU-years) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Compute Cloud VCPU is 81 VCPU-years.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Compute Cloud VGPU (RGU-years) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Compute Cloud VGPU is 3.6 RGU-years.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Persistent Cloud VCPU (VCPU-years) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Persistent Cloud VCPU is 26 VCPU-years.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Volume and Snapshot Storage (TB) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Volume and Snapshot Storage is 11 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Shared Filesystem Storage (TB) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Shared Filesystem Storage is 11 TB.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum amount of Object Storage (TB) required for a RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: The minimum amount of Object Storage is 11 TB.

qa_pairs.question: If I require multiple cloud resources for a particular cloud site, do all of them need to meet their minimums for my request to be eligible?
qa_pairs.answer: No, as long as one of the resources needed in a particular cloud site is equal to or greater than the minimum specified, the request is eligible. In that case, the online form must include all the cloud resources needed on that site, even if the amounts requested for some resources are below the minimum.

qa_pairs.question: What is crucial to remember when filling out the online application form for resource requests?
qa_pairs.answer: It is extremely important that the online application form includes a request for every resource (CPU, GPU, storage or cloud) that your project needs on each cluster.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if there is a discrepancy between the amount of resources requested in the attached application document and the online form?
qa_pairs.answer: In case of discrepancy, what was requested in the online form will prevail.

qa_pairs.question: If I need 180 core-years and 50 TB of project storage on Fir, how should I make my RAC application request?
qa_pairs.answer: Your RAC application should only request 50 TB of storage on that cluster. You should not request CPU in your application as you may be able to get the CPU that you need without a RAC allocation.

qa_pairs.question: If I need 500 core-years, 20 TB of project storage, and 80 TB of nearline storage on Narval, what resources should I request through my RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: Your RAC application should only request 500 core-years on that cluster, as your storage needs can be met with what is available via RAS.

qa_pairs.question: How should I submit my RAC application if I need 100 core-years with 10 TB of project storage on Trillium and 50 TB of nearline storage on HPSS?
qa_pairs.answer: You should only request the 10 TB and 50 TB of storage on those clusters, respectively, as you may be able to get the CPU that you need without a RAC allocation.

qa_pairs.question: If my project needs 400 core-years, 30 RGU-years, and 200 TB of project storage on Nibi, what should I request in my RAC application?
qa_pairs.answer: You must request all these resources in your RAC application as they are all above the minimum eligible amounts specified in the table.

qa_pairs.question: Is a CPU request for 150 core-years on Rorqual eligible if it includes 100 cores with 16 GB per core (400 core-equivalent-years) and 50 cores with 4 GB per core (50 core-equivalent-years)?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, this request is acceptable because the total core-equivalent-years needed on a single cluster is greater than the minimum amount of CPU specified in the table. You can make two separate CPU requests or one averaged request.

qa_pairs.question: If I need a total of 45 TB of project storage, split as 20 TB on Rorqual and 25 TB on Narval, is this request eligible for RAC?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, this request is eligible since the total amount of project storage needed exceeds 41 TB.

qa_pairs.question: If I need a total of 100 TB of storage, split as 50 TB of project storage and 50 TB of nearline on Fir, is this request eligible for RAC?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, this request is eligible because even though the nearline amount is below the minimum (101 TB), the project storage request is eligible. Therefore, you should include both requests in your application.

qa_pairs.question: If I need 100 VCPU of compute cloud resources on Arbutus, 5 TB of Volume and snapshot storage, and 5 TB of object storage, what should I include in my online form?
qa_pairs.answer: You should request all these resources in the online form. Since the amount of VCPUs needed on Arbutus exceeds the minimum required to apply, the storage resources must be included in the same request even if they are less than 11 TB.

qa_pairs.question: Why would a request for 250 core-years total, split into 100 cores on Fir and 150 cores on Nibi, be rejected?
qa_pairs.answer: This request will NOT be accepted because you may be able to get the CPU that you need without a RAC allocation. Each cluster's request (100 cores and 150 cores, respectively) is below the 200 core-years minimum.

qa_pairs.question: Why would a request for 20 reference GPU units (RGU) total, split between Narval (10 RGU) and Rorqual (10 RGU), be rejected?
qa_pairs.answer: This request will not be accepted because each individual cluster request (10 RGU each) is below the 25 RGU-years minimum.

qa_pairs.question: Why would a request for 25 VCPU of persistent cloud resources and 10 TB of Volume and snapshot storage on Arbutus be rejected?
qa_pairs.answer: You should not apply for RAC with this request as these resources are below the minimum eligible amounts (26 VCPU-years and 11 TB, respectively) and are likely available via RAS.
